title: CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTH COUNTY SERVICES CENTER CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive services to children, youth, young adults and their families including individual, family, and group therapy that focus on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 51340 Highway 97 South La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Children under age 18 and young adults presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, psychosis, and trauma-related issues Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 322-7500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 322-7500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes County and Cities of Crescent, Crescent Lake, and La Pine Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH COUNTY SERVICES CENTER
